Chapter two
How to become a very good mundane astrologer.
Many astrologers have the knack of saying all negative
things about India and the world. This is due to the lack
of knowledge.
Following is the subject idea needed for basic mundane
astrology predictions- geography, history, economics,
international politics, and geology is needed. A basic
knowledge based on the plus two level of the Indian
syllabus will be sufficient for this.
Many astrologers make a failure of themselves without
understanding these subjects. So before venturing into
